summary: Code quality is high: TypeScript is properly typed with clear error handling; workflow follows YAML best practices (pinned actions, minimal permissions, set -euo pipefail). However, deliverable is incomplete: workflow references labels.config.json and fixtures/mixed.txt (not provided); references labeler.test.ts and cli.test.ts to run (not shown); task requires act-result.txt (missing), actionlint validation (no evidence), and workflow.test.ts harness to spawn act (not provided). Bun install in workflow could idempotently check PATH before curl. Without these supporting files and validation evidence, solution cannot be tested or deployed per task requirements.
